subcodes.title: Words to the Portland and Seattle Baha'is, spoken on 1912-10-22
subcodes.first_line: Until now it never happened that someone from the East, impelled by the promptings of his conscience, should come to the West to see the friends of God... A great war and commotion shall inevitably take place
subcodes.first_line_orig: تا حال واقع نشده که از شرق شخصی بغرب بیابد محض انبعاثات وجدانی و ملاقات دوستان الهی
subcodes.subjects: @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @status of kings; future of monarchy
